item.title:
DPWorldTour: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 3min "So close to an albatross from Fitzpatrick!"
Back in 2022 at Marco Simone Golf Club,
item.description:
DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 3min "So close to an albatross from Fitzpatrick!"
Back in 2022 at Marco Simone Golf Club, @MattFitz94 hit the pin at the par-five 12th hole during the final round of the Italian Open 0:37 528

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 25min Players with 3+ wins and +2.0 SG in the last 8 months:
• Scottie Scheffler • Matt
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 25min Players with 3+ wins and +2.0 SG in the last 8 months:
• Scottie Scheffler • Matt Fitzpatrick
That's it. 1 14 994

item.title: DPWorldTour: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 1h In 2013, @MattFitz94 won the Silver Medal at The Open Championship after finishing as
item.description:
DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 1h In 2013, @MattFitz94 won the Silver Medal at The Open Championship after finishing as the low amateur and later that year, went on to win the US Amateur.
13 years later, he's now a 10 time DP World Tour winner, four time PGA TOUR winner and a Major Champion.
Just a boy from Mostrar más 2 1 75 6 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h In retrospect if Gabriel falls to the ground here the goal probably doesn’t stand. Same wit
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h In retrospect if Gabriel falls to the ground here the goal probably doesn’t stand. Same with Haaland and the headbutt. It’s for the better of the game and to the credit of both players that they just got on with it. Proper battle that Haaland edged in the end. Cita Mac @Mac_Gooner · 3h A foul everyone ignored 1 26 11 mil
